sections.title: Definition of Consumer
sections.summary: Explains who is considered a 'consumer' under the law, including those who buy goods or services for personal use.
sections.example: If you buy a phone from a store and it's defective, you are a consumer and can file a complaint.

sections.title: Manner in which complaint shall be made
sections.summary: Describes how a consumer can file a complaint against unfair trade practices or defective goods.
sections.example: You can file a complaint with the District Commission if a company refuses to honor a warranty.
